title: Prismor Warden Policy Schema
description: Schema for Warden YAML policy files that define detection rules, allowlists, and enforcement actions.

rules.description: Detection rules evaluated against agent events

allowlists.description: Allowlist entries that suppress specific rule matches

settings.description: Policy-level settings that control enforcement behaviour

default_mode.description: Global observe/enforce default for rules that don't set their own `mode`. Defaults to observe (nothing blocks until a rule is flipped to enforce).

block_categories.description: Legacy: finding categories eligible to block. Enforcement is now decided per-rule via `mode`/`default_mode`; this is retained for compatibility.

manifest_patterns.description: Regex patterns that identify dependency manifest files (used for severity upgrades)

egress_allowlist.description: Outbound domains allowed without a warning (supports wildcards, e.g. "*.github.com"). Empty allows all.

mcp_transport_action.description: Action for insecure MCP remote-transport findings raised by scan (cleartext/raw-IP/off-allowlist/hardcoded-secret). Defaults to warn.

semantic_guard.description: Settings for the optional LLM-assisted semantic prompt-injection layer.

severity.description: Finding severity when this rule matches

category.description: Finding category for grouping and feed correlation

event_types.description: Event types this rule applies to (shell, file_read, file_write, network, prompt, tool_result)

fields.description: Event fields to match against. Defaults to the canonical field for the event type (command for shell, path for file_*, url for network, combined_text for prompt/tool_result).

patterns.description: Regex patterns (Python re syntax). A match on ANY pattern triggers the rule.

action.description: Legacy/decorative classification. Observe vs enforce is now controlled by `mode`/`default_mode`, not this field.

mode.description: Per-rule observe/enforce override. observe = detect + log only; enforce = block on a pre-action event. Omit to inherit settings.default_mode (default observe).

add_patterns.description: Extra regex patterns to add to this rule on top of its defaults. Custom org-specific detections — strengthen-only.

disable_patterns.description: Default regex patterns to disable for this rule, referenced by their exact regex string. Not allowed on core protections. A no-match entry is ignored (drift fails toward more detection).

enabled.description: Whether this rule is active. Defaults to true.

severity_on_write.description: Override severity when the matched event_type is file_write

severity_on_manifest.description: Override severity when the matched path is a dependency manifest file

rule_ids.description: Rule IDs this allowlist applies to. Use ['*'] for all rules.

patterns.description: Regex patterns that, when matched, suppress the finding.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for this allowlist entry
